_comment: Configuration-driven Confidence scoring for the Prediction Engine (V2.0 Phase 7), consumed by predictionRuleEvaluator.js. This is a deterministic, transparent scoring model — not a statistical or ML confidence — built entirely from already-computed backend facts (Planet Strength's adjustedScore/functionalNature/combustion/retrograde, and counts of already-detected supporting yogas/doshas). Documented here as the same kind of foundation-phase deterministic approximation the rest of this backend already uses (see transitEngine.js / dashaRuleEvaluator.js headers) rather than real predictive statistics.
